---
title: "NASIS Training Courses"
subtitle: "Course Listing"
author:
  - name: Soil and Plant Science Division Staff
    affiliation:
    - USDA-NRCS
format: html
date: today
title-block-banner: "#19567B"
---

## Browse Courses

##### 1. [NASIS 1010 - NASIS Basic Training](https://ncss-tech.github.io/nasis_training/content/nasis1010.html)
##### 2. [NASIS 2020 - NASIS Query and Report Writing](https://ncss-tech.github.io/nasis_training/content/nasis2020.html)
